zh.lifeSummary: 當Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III於0997年出生在法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯時，他的父親Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosa27歲，母親Emma de Provence48歲。他於1022年與Mayor在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1060年在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在法國奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III于0997年出生在法国奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯时，他的父亲Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosa27岁，母亲Emma de Provence48岁。他于1022年与Mayor在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1060年在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在法国奧其坦尼豪-加洛圖勞斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toulouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Monique, Camile, Emile, Gilles, Marcel, Rosaire.

French and English: habitational name from Toulouse, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France, most notably the city in Haute-Garonne, the capital of this French department and of the region of Occitanie.

nameMeanings.name: Pons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Pedro, Ramon, Guillermo, Roberto, Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Mario, Rafael, Apolonia.  French Adrien, Armand, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Marcelle, Matilde.
Catalan, French (Occitan), and Dutch: from the medieval personal name Pons (see Ponce ).
German: patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name, such as Bonhard, formed with the element bon ‘request, petition’ (compare Latin bonus).

variants.name: Ponce
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Luis, Jesus, Carlos, Francisco, Jorge, Miguel, Pedro, Raul, Roberto.

Spanish and French: from the medieval personal name Ponce, ultimately from Pontius, a Roman surname, perhaps an ethnic name for someone from Pontus (named from Greek pontos ‘ocean’) in Asia Minor, or an Italic cognate of Latin Quintus ‘fifth’ (i.e. ‘fifth-born’). The name was borne by two 3rd-century Christian saints, a Carthaginian deacon and a martyr of Nice, but was not widely popular in the Middle Ages because of the inhibiting influence of the even more famous Pontius Pilate. In some cases though, the surname may have been originally used for someone who had played the part of this character in a religious play.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III was born in 0997, in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, his father, Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosa, was 27 and his mother, Emma de Provence, was 48. He married Mayor in 1022, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1060, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III est né en 0997, à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France, son père, Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosa, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Emma de Provence, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Mayor en 1022, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1060, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III 0997 in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosa 27 und seine Mutter Emma de Provence 48. Er hat 1022 in Europa Mayor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1060 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III è nato il nel 0997 nel Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosa, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Provence, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Mayor nel 1022, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1060, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Pons Guillaume de Toulouse IIIが0997年にフランスオクシタニーハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼで生まれた時，父Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosaは27歳，母Emma de Provenceは48歳であった。1022年にヨーロッパでMayorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1060年に故郷で63歳で死去し，フランスオクシタニーハウテ-ガーオントウロウゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III(이)가 0997년 프랑스 옥시탠이 하테-가니 토우루스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosa(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Provence(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1022년 우럽에서 Mayor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1060년 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 옥시탠이 하테-가니 토우루스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III nasceu em 0997, em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosa, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Provence, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Mayor em 1022, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1060, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III родился в 0997 г. в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, окситани, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosa было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Provence, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Mayor в 1022 г. в местности Европа. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1060 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности тоулоус, хауте-гаронн, окситани, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pons Guillaume de Toulouse III nació en 0997, en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Guillermo III Tallaferro , Conde de Tolosa, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Emma de Provence, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Mayor en 1022, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1060, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Toulouse, Haute-Garonne, Occitanie, Francia.
